# Inspect Harbor

> Inspect AI interface to Harbor tasks

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/index.html.md): Overview, installation, prerequisites, and quick start for Inspect Harbor.

## Using Harbor

- [Datasets](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/datasets.html.md): Importing Harbor task functions, pinning to a specific Harbor ref, and known dataset issues.
- [Task Parameters](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/parameters.html.md): Reference for the parameters accepted by Harbor task functions.
- [Agents and Solvers](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/agents.html.md): Default agent scaffold, custom agents, and the Oracle solver for verifying Harbor datasets.
- [Task Format](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/tasks.html.md): The Harbor task file structure and how Harbor concepts map to Inspect AI concepts, including LLM judge verification.
- [Advanced](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/advanced.html.md): Generic harbor() interface, org/name and name@version dataset slugs, loading from git or local paths, and cache management.

## Registry

- [Registry](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_harbor/registry.html.md): Complete catalog of Harbor datasets available as Inspect tasks.
